   "source": [
    "import os, re, unicodedata, json, time, glob\n",
    "from collections import Counter\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import torch\n",
    "import torch.nn as nn\n",
    "import torch.nn.functional as F\n",
    "from torch.utils.data import Dataset, DataLoader, WeightedRandomSampler\n",
    "from torch.optim.lr_scheduler import ReduceLROnPlateau\n",
    "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import classification_report, confusion_matrix, f1_score, accuracy_score\n",
    "from underthesea import word_tokenize, text_normalize\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "\n",
    "# Auto-detect FastText\n",
    "vec_files = glob.glob('/kaggle/input/**/*.vec', recursive=True)\n",
    "print('FastText .vec tim thay:')\n",
    "for f in vec_files: print(f'  {f}')\n",
    "if not vec_files: print('  (khong co) -> scratch embedding')\n",
    "\n",
    "WORKING_DIR   = '/kaggle/working'\n",
    "USE_FASTTEXT  = bool(vec_files)\n",
    "FASTTEXT_PATH = vec_files[0] if vec_files else ''\n",
    "\n",
    "EMB_DIM      = 300 if USE_FASTTEXT else 128\n",
    "HIDDEN_DIM   = 256\n",
    "NUM_HEADS    = 4\n",
    "NUM_LAYERS   = 2\n",
    "DROPOUT      = 0.5\n",
    "MAX_LEN      = 64\n",
    "BATCH_SIZE   = 64\n",
    "LR           = 3e-4\n",
    "NUM_EPOCHS   = 40\n",
    "PATIENCE_ES  = 8\n",
    "MIN_FREQ     = 2\n",
    "LABEL_MAP    = {'tich_cuc': 0, 'tieu_cuc': 1, 'trung_tinh': 2}\n",
    "LABEL_NAMES  = ['Tich cuc', 'Tieu cuc', 'Trung tinh']\n",
    "DEVICE       = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')\n",
    "\n",
    "for d in ['data/raw','data/processed','vocab','checkpoints','logs']:\n",
    "    os.makedirs(f'{WORKING_DIR}/{d}', exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f'\\nDevice   : {DEVICE}')\n",
    "print(f'FastText : {\"BAT -> \" + FASTTEXT_PATH if USE_FASTTEXT else \"TAT -- scratch 128d\"}')\n",
    "print(f'EMB_DIM  : {EMB_DIM}  HIDDEN: {HIDDEN_DIM}  HEADS: {NUM_HEADS}')\n",
    "print(f'MAX_LEN  : {MAX_LEN}  BATCH : {BATCH_SIZE}')\n"
   ]
  },

    "# TAI NGUYEN NGON NGU MO RONG v2.2\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "TEENCODE = {\n",
    "    # Phu dinh -- KHONG xoa\n",
    "    'ko':'khong','k':'khong','khg':'khong','hok':'khong','kh':'khong',\n",
    "    'koong':'khong','khongg':'khong','hem':'khong','hong':'khong',\n",
    "    'chang':'chang','chg':'chang','cg':'chang',\n",

    "    'rac':'te','xau':'xau','dep':'dep','tot':'tot',\n",

    "    'khong_dang':'khong dang','khong_mua':'khong mua',\n",
    "    'rat_tot':'rat tot','rat_dep':'rat dep','rat_te':'rat te',\n",
    "    'tot_lam':'rat tot','dep_lam':'rat dep','te_lam':'rat te',\n",
    "    'xau_lam':'rat xau',\n",
    "    # Duoc\n",

    "    # Ship\n",

    "    're':'nhanh','le':'nhanh','nhanh_le':'nhanh',\n",

    "    # Chat luong\n",
    "    'cl':'chat luong','clg':'chat luong','chat_lg':'chat luong',\n",
    "    'xin':'tot','xin_xo':'rat tot','dinh':'xuat sac','ngon':'tot',\n",
    "    'xit':'te','cui':'te','cui_bap':'rat te','phon':'kem',\n",
    "    'fake':'hang gia','hang_nhai':'hang gia',\n",
    "    # Kich thuoc\n",
    "    'sz':'kich co','size':'kich co',\n",
    "    # Shop\n",
    "    'shop':'cua hang','seller':'nguoi ban',\n",
    "    'cskh':'cham soc khach hang',\n",
    "    # Cam xuc\n",
    "    'thik':'thich','ik':'thich','mik':'minh','mk':'minh',\n",
    "    'bh':'bay gio','tl':'tra loi','rep':'tra loi',\n",
    "    'haha':'vui','hihi':'vui','hehe':'vui','huhu':'buon',\n",
    "    # Pho bien\n",
    "    'dt':'dien thoai','qc':'quang cao',\n",
    "    'vs':'voi','cx':'cung','nx':'nua','bt':'binh thuong',\n",
    "    'gia_re':'gia re','gia_cao':'gia cao',\n",
    "    'dang_tien':'dang tien','khong_dang_tien':'khong dang tien',\n",
    "    'mua_lai':'mua lai','khong_mua_lai':'khong mua lai',\n",
    "    '5_sao':'nam sao','4_sao':'bon sao','3_sao':'ba sao',\n",
    "    '2_sao':'hai sao','1_sao':'mot sao',\n",
    "    'dong_goi':'dong goi','can_than':'can than',\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "# Emoji -> token name (khong dung ngoac)\n",
    "EMOJI_MAP = {\n",
    "    '\\U0001f60d':'positive_strong','\\U0001f970':'positive_strong',\n",
    "    '\\U0001f929':'positive_strong','\\U0001f4af':'positive_strong',\n",
    "    '\\U0001f525':'positive_strong','\\u2b50':'positive_strong',\n",

    "    '\\U0001f922':'negative_strong','\\U0001f915':'negative_strong',\n",

    "}\n",
    "\n",

    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "SAFE_STOPWORDS = {\n",

    "    # KHONG THEM: khong, chang, chua\n",

    "\n",

      "Quet /kaggle/input...\n",
      "  OK: data - data.csv -- 31,460 dong\n",
      "  OK: train.csv -- 12,870 dong\n",
      "  OK: test.csv -- 3,217 dong\n",
      "  OK: vsa_food_rv_train.csv -- 22,847 dong\n",
      "\n",

   "source": [
    "# NAP VA GOP DU LIEU\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "all_frames = []\n",
    "\n",
    "print('Nap Shopee Reviews...')\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    df1 = pd.read_csv(\n",
    "        '/kaggle/input/datasets/linhlpv/vietnamese-sentiment-analyst/data.csv'\n",
    "    ).iloc[:, [0, 2]]\n",
    "    df1.columns = ['comment', 'rating']\n",
    "    df1['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df1['rating'], errors='coerce')\n",
    "    df1['label'] = df1['rating'].apply(\n",
    "        lambda x: 'tieu_cuc' if x <= 2 else ('trung_tinh' if x == 3 else 'tich_cuc'))\n",
    "    all_frames.append(df1[['comment', 'label']])\n",
    "    print(f'  OK: {len(df1):,} dong')\n",
    "except Exception as e:\n",
    "    print(f'  Loi: {e}')\n",
    "\n",
    "print('Quet /kaggle/input...')\n",
    "all_files = []\n",
    "for ext in ['*.csv', '*.xlsx']:\n",
    "    all_files.extend(glob.glob(f'/kaggle/input/**/{ext}', recursive=True))\n",
    "\n",
    "for fp in all_files:\n",
    "    fpl = fp.lower()\n",
    "    if 'vietnamese-sentiment-analyst/data.csv' in fpl: continue\n",
    "    if fpl.endswith('.vec') or fpl.endswith('.bin'): continue\n",
    "    try:\n",
    "        tmp = (pd.read_excel(fp) if fp.endswith('.xlsx')\n",
    "               else pd.read_csv(fp, on_bad_lines='skip'))\n",
    "        text_col  = next((c for c in tmp.columns\n",
    "                          if any(k in c.lower() for k in ['text','comment','review','content'])), None)\n",
    "        label_col = next((c for c in tmp.columns\n",
    "                          if any(k in c.lower() for k in ['label','sentiment','rating','stars'])), None)\n",
    "        if not text_col or not label_col: continue\n",
    "        out = pd.DataFrame()\n",
    "        out['comment'] = tmp[text_col].astype(str).str.strip()\n",
    "        sv = str(tmp[label_col].iloc[0]).lower()\n",
    "        if sv.replace('.','',1).isdigit():\n",
    "            tmp[label_col] = pd.to_numeric(tmp[label_col], errors='coerce')\n",
    "            mx = tmp[label_col].max()\n",
    "            if 'aivivn' in fpl:\n",
    "                out['label'] = tmp[label_col].apply(\n",
    "                    lambda x: 'tich_cuc' if int(x)==1 else 'tieu_cuc')\n",
    "            elif mx <= 5:\n",
    "                out['label'] = tmp[label_col].apply(\n",
    "                    lambda x: 'tieu_cuc' if x<=2 else ('trung_tinh' if x==3 else 'tich_cuc'))\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                out['label'] = tmp[label_col].apply(\n",
    "                    lambda x: 'tieu_cuc' if x<5 else ('trung_tinh' if x==5 else 'tich_cuc'))\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            out['label'] = tmp[label_col].astype(str).str.lower().map({\n",
    "                'pos':'tich_cuc','positive':'tich_cuc','1':'tich_cuc',\n",
    "                'neg':'tieu_cuc','negative':'tieu_cuc','0':'tieu_cuc',\n",
    "                'neu':'trung_tinh','neutral':'trung_tinh','2':'trung_tinh',\n",
    "            })\n",
    "        out = out.dropna(subset=['comment','label'])\n",
    "        if len(out) > 100:\n",
    "            all_frames.append(out[['comment','label']])\n",
    "            print(f'  OK: {os.path.basename(fp)} -- {len(out):,} dong')\n",
    "    except Exception:\n",
    "        pass\n",
    "\n",
    "df_raw = (pd.concat(all_frames, ignore_index=True)\n",
    "          .drop_duplicates(subset=['comment'])\n",
    "          .dropna()\n",
    "          .reset_index(drop=True))\n",
    "print(f'\\nTong: {len(df_raw):,} mau')\n",
    "print(df_raw['label'].value_counts().to_string())\n",
    "df_raw.to_csv(f'{WORKING_DIR}/data/raw/combined.csv', index=False)\n"
   ]
  },

      "    OUT: dep_lam sieu nhanh\n",
      "\n",
      "  [Mia mai] OK\n",
      "    IN : nhanh nhu rua bo 🐢 dinh that\n",
      "    OUT: nhanh nhu_rua bo slow xuat sac that\n",
      "\n",
      "PATCH 1: PASS -- khong con placeholder ro\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# PIPELINE TIEN XU LY v2.2\n",
    "# PATCH 1: placeholder dung chu thuong ngay tu dau\n",
    "#          -> word_tokenize khong lam thay doi -> restore chinh xac\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "_PH_PREFIX = 'stkn'   # chu THUONG -- khong bi lowercase sau tokenize\n",
    "\n",
    "def map_emoji_to_placeholder(text):\n",
    "    mapping = {}\n",
    "    idx = 0\n",
    "    for emoji, token in EMOJI_MAP.items():\n",
    "        while emoji in text:\n",
    "            ph = f'{_PH_PREFIX}{idx}z'  # stkn0z, stkn1z... chu thuong, ky tu z la delimiter\n",
    "            mapping[ph] = token\n",
    "            text = text.replace(emoji, f' {ph} ', 1)\n",
    "            idx += 1\n",
    "    return text, mapping\n",
    "\n",
    "def map_punct_to_placeholder(text, mapping):\n",
    "    for pattern, token in PUNCT_RULES:\n",
    "        def replacer(m, t=token, mp=mapping):\n",
    "            ph = f'{_PH_PREFIX}{len(mp)}z'\n",
    "            mp[ph] = t\n",
    "            return f' {ph} '\n",
    "        text = re.sub(pattern, replacer, text)\n",
    "    return text\n",
    "\n",
    "def restore_placeholders(text, mapping):\n",
    "    # placeholder dang stkn0z -- word_tokenize giu nguyen vi la alphanum\n",
    "    for ph, token in mapping.items():\n",
    "        text = text.replace(ph, f' {token} ')\n",
    "    return text\n",
    "\n",
    "def clean_text_v2(text):\n",
    "    text = str(text)\n",
    "    text = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', text)\n",
    "    text = text_normalize(text)\n",
    "    # B2-3: emoji & punct -> placeholder (TRUOC tokenize)\n",
    "    text, mapping = map_emoji_to_placeholder(text)\n",
    "    text = map_punct_to_placeholder(text, mapping)\n",
    "    # B4: xoa HTML, URL\n",
    "    text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', text)\n",
    "    text = re.sub(r'http\\S+|www\\S+', ' ', text)\n",
    "    # B5: lowercase (placeholder da la lowercase -> khong bi lech)\n",
    "    text = text.lower()\n",
    "    # B6: teencode\n",
    "    words = text.split()\n",
    "    words = [TEENCODE.get(w, w) for w in words]\n",
    "    text  = ' '.join(words)\n",
    "    # B7: word_tokenize -- placeholder stkn0z duoc giu nguyen\n",
    "    text = word_tokenize(text, format='text')\n",
    "    # B8: RESTORE placeholder -> token that\n",
    "    text = restore_placeholders(text, mapping)\n",
    "    # B9: xoa ky tu dac biet, giu dau _\n",
    "    text = re.sub(r'[^\\w\\s_]', ' ', text)\n",
    "    # B10: stopword + do dai\n",
    "    tokens = [t for t in text.split() if t not in SAFE_STOPWORDS and len(t) > 1]\n",
    "    return ' '.join(tokens)\n",
    "\n",
    "# ── KIEM TRA PATCH 1 ────────────────────────────────────\n",
    "print('Test clean_text_v2.2 (PATCH 1 -- placeholder lowercase):')\n",
    "tests = [\n",
    "    ('Emoji double',  'San pham tuyet \\U0001f60d\\U0001f60d ship nhanh!!!'),\n",
    "    ('Emoji neg',     'hang ko tot \\U0001f621 that vong lam'),\n",
    "    ('Phu dinh',      'khong dep lam, chat luong khong tot'),\n",
    "    ('OOV khong dau', 'Rac qua te lam k mua lai'),\n",
    "    ('Dau cau !!!',   'Dep lam!!! sieu nhanh???'),\n",
    "    ('Mia mai',       'nhanh nhu rua bo \\U0001f422 dinh that'),\n",
    "]\n",
    "all_ok = True\n",
    "for label, t in tests:\n",
    "    out = clean_text_v2(t)\n",
    "    has_ph = any(f'{_PH_PREFIX}' in tok and tok.endswith('z')\n",
    "                 for tok in out.split())\n",
    "    status = 'PLACEHOLDER BUG' if has_ph else 'OK'\n",
    "    if has_ph: all_ok = False\n",
    "    print(f'  [{label}] {status}')\n",
    "    print(f'    IN : {t}')\n",
    "    print(f'    OUT: {out}')\n",
    "    print()\n",
    "print('PATCH 1:', 'PASS -- khong con placeholder ro' if all_ok else 'FAIL -- kiem tra lai')\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# XU LY & XAY TU VUNG\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "import time\n",
    "\n",
    "df_all = (pd.read_csv(f'{WORKING_DIR}/data/raw/combined.csv')\n",
    "          .dropna(subset=['comment','label']))\n",
    "df_all = df_all[df_all['label'].isin(LABEL_MAP.keys())].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f'Tong: {len(df_all):,} mau -- tien xu ly...')\n",
    "t0 = time.time()\n",
    "df_all['text_clean'] = df_all['comment'].astype(str).apply(clean_text_v2)\n",
    "df_all = df_all[df_all['text_clean'].str.strip() != ''].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
    "print(f'Xong ({time.time()-t0:.0f}s) -- con {len(df_all):,} mau')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Chia TRUOC khi xay vocab\n",
    "train_df, temp_df = train_test_split(\n",
    "    df_all, test_size=0.2, stratify=df_all['label'], random_state=42)\n",
    "val_df, test_df   = train_test_split(\n",
    "    temp_df, test_size=0.5, stratify=temp_df['label'], random_state=42)\n",
    "print(f'Train: {len(train_df):,} | Val: {len(val_df):,} | Test: {len(test_df):,}')\n",
    "\n",
    "counter = Counter()\n",
    "for txt in train_df['text_clean']:\n",
    "    counter.update(txt.split())\n",
    "\n",
    "vocab = {'<PAD>': 0, '<UNK>': 1}\n",
    "for word, freq in counter.items():\n",
    "    if freq >= MIN_FREQ:\n",
    "        vocab[word] = len(vocab)\n",
    "print(f'Vocab: {len(vocab):,} tu')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Kiem tra sentiment tokens\n",
    "s_tokens = set(EMOJI_MAP.values()) | {r for _, r in PUNCT_RULES}\n",
    "in_v  = [t for t in s_tokens if t in vocab]\n",
    "out_v = [t for t in s_tokens if t not in vocab]\n",
    "print(f'Sentiment tokens trong vocab: {len(in_v)}/{len(s_tokens)}')\n",
    "if out_v: print(f'  Chua co (dung UNK): {out_v}')\n",
    "\n",
    "with open(f'{WORKING_DIR}/vocab/vocab.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n",
    "    json.dump(vocab, f, ensure_ascii=False)\n",
    "for name, df in [('train',train_df),('val',val_df),('test',test_df)]:\n",
    "    df.to_csv(f'{WORKING_DIR}/data/processed/{name}.csv', index=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "lengths = train_df['text_clean'].apply(lambda x: len(x.split()))\n",
    "print(f'\\nDo dai token: p50={lengths.quantile(.5):.0f}  p90={lengths.quantile(.9):.0f}  '\n",
    "      f'p95={lengths.quantile(.95):.0f}  p99={lengths.quantile(.99):.0f}')\n",
    "print(f'MAX_LEN={MAX_LEN} bao phu {(lengths<=MAX_LEN).mean()*100:.1f}%')\n"
   ]
  },

      "Doc FastText: /kaggle/input/datasets/phchngthi/ccvi300vecgz/cc.vi.300.vec\n",
      "Can tim: 18,478 vocab tu + 8,374 don tu (cho compound avg)\n",
      "(~3-5 phut...)\n",
      "  Header: 2000000 tu, dim=300\n",
      "  Quet 500,000 dong | Direct: 6,443 | Single bank: 7,299\n",
      "  Quet 1,000,000 dong | Direct: 6,689 | Single bank: 7,564\n",
      "  Quet 1,500,000 dong | Direct: 6,820 | Single bank: 7,705\n",
      "  Quet 2,000,000 dong | Direct: 6,860 | Single bank: 7,750\n",
      "\n",
      "Ket qua coverage:\n",
      "  Direct match    : 6,860\n",
      "  Compound (full) : 10,498  <- PATCH 2\n",
      "  Compound (part) : 560  <- PATCH 2\n",
      "  Tong / Vocab    : 17,918 / 18,476  (97.0%)\n",
      "  (v2.1: 36.8% -> v2.2: uoc tinh ~70%+)\n",
      "Embedding shape: torch.Size([18478, 300])\n",
      "EMB_DIM cuoi: 300\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# TAI FASTTEXT + COMPOUND WORD AVERAGING\n",
    "# PATCH 2: tu ghep 'giao_hang' = avg(vec('giao'), vec('hang'))\n",
    "#          -> tang coverage tu 36% len ~70%+\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "def load_fasttext_embeddings(path, vocab, emb_dim=300):\n",
    "    vocab_set = set(vocab.keys())\n",
    "    mat = np.random.normal(scale=0.05, size=(len(vocab), emb_dim)).astype(np.float32)\n",
    "    mat[0] = 0.0  # PAD\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Tap hop tat ca don tu can tim (ca trong tu ghep)\n",
    "    single_words_needed = set()\n",
    "    for word in vocab_set:\n",
    "        if '_' in word:\n",
    "            for part in word.split('_'):\n",
    "                single_words_needed.add(part)\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            single_words_needed.add(word)\n",
    "\n",
    "    found_single = {}  # word -> np.array (luu de dung cho compound)\n",
    "    found_direct = 0\n",
    "\n",
    "    print(f'Doc FastText: {path}')\n",
    "    print(f'Can tim: {len(vocab_set):,} vocab tu + {len(single_words_needed):,} don tu (cho compound avg)')\n",
    "    print('(~3-5 phut...)')\n",
    "\n",
    "    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:\n",
    "        header = f.readline().strip().split()\n",
    "        print(f'  Header: {header[0]} tu, dim={header[1]}')\n",
    "        for i, line in enumerate(f):\n",
    "            parts = line.rstrip().split(' ')\n",
    "            if len(parts) != emb_dim + 1: continue\n",
    "            word = parts[0]\n",
    "            # Thu tuc 1: tim truc tiep trong vocab\n",
    "            if word in vocab_set:\n",
    "                try:\n",
    "                    vec = np.array(parts[1:], dtype=np.float32)\n",
    "                    mat[vocab[word]] = vec\n",
    "                    found_single[word] = vec\n",
    "                    found_direct += 1\n",
    "                except ValueError:\n",
    "                    pass\n",
    "            # Thu tuc 2: luu don tu cho compound averaging\n",
    "            elif word in single_words_needed:\n",
    "                try:\n",
    "                    found_single[word] = np.array(parts[1:], dtype=np.float32)\n",
    "                except ValueError:\n",
    "                    pass\n",
    "            if (i+1) % 500_000 == 0:\n",
    "                print(f'  Quet {i+1:,} dong | Direct: {found_direct:,} | '\n",
    "                      f'Single bank: {len(found_single):,}')\n",
    "\n",
    "    # PATCH 2: Compound word averaging\n",
    "    compound_filled = 0\n",
    "    compound_partial = 0\n",
    "    for word, idx in vocab.items():\n",
    "        if '_' not in word: continue\n",
    "        if word in found_single: continue  # da co direct vector\n",
    "        parts = word.split('_')\n",
    "        vecs  = [found_single[p] for p in parts if p in found_single]\n",
    "        if len(vecs) == len(parts):   # tat ca don tu deu co vector\n",
    "            mat[idx] = np.mean(vecs, axis=0)\n",
    "            compound_filled += 1\n",
    "        elif vecs:                    # chi co mot phan\n",
    "            mat[idx] = np.mean(vecs, axis=0)\n",
    "            compound_partial += 1\n",
    "\n",
    "    total_covered = found_direct + compound_filled + compound_partial\n",
    "    cov = total_covered / max(len(vocab)-2, 1) * 100\n",
    "    print(f'\\nKet qua coverage:')\n",
    "    print(f'  Direct match    : {found_direct:,}')\n",
    "    print(f'  Compound (full) : {compound_filled:,}  <- PATCH 2')\n",
    "    print(f'  Compound (part) : {compound_partial:,}  <- PATCH 2')\n",
    "    print(f'  Tong / Vocab    : {total_covered:,} / {len(vocab)-2:,}  ({cov:.1f}%)')\n",
    "    print(f'  (v2.1: 36.8% -> v2.2: uoc tinh ~70%+)')\n",
    "    return torch.FloatTensor(mat)\n",
    "\n",
    "pretrained_weights = None\n",
    "if USE_FASTTEXT and os.path.exists(FASTTEXT_PATH):\n",
    "    pretrained_weights = load_fasttext_embeddings(FASTTEXT_PATH, vocab, EMB_DIM)\n",
    "    print(f'Embedding shape: {pretrained_weights.shape}')\n",
    "elif USE_FASTTEXT:\n",
    "    print(f'Khong tim thay: {FASTTEXT_PATH} -> scratch 128d')\n",
    "    EMB_DIM = 128\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    print('FastText TAT -> scratch 128d')\n",
    "    EMB_DIM = 128\n",
    "print(f'EMB_DIM cuoi: {EMB_DIM}')\n"
   ]
  },

      "Train batches: 1025 | Val: 129 | Test: 129\n",

   ],
   "source": [
    "# DATASET & DATALOADER\n",
    "# PATCH 3: TAT WeightedRandomSampler\n",
    "#          Chi dung class_weight trong loss (Cell 10)\n",
    "#          Hai co che dung cung nhau -> xung dot -> F1 tut\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "class ReviewDataset(Dataset):\n",
    "    def __init__(self, df, vocab, max_len=MAX_LEN):\n",
    "        self.texts   = df['text_clean'].tolist()\n",
    "        self.labels  = [LABEL_MAP[l] for l in df['label']]\n",
    "        self.vocab   = vocab\n",
    "        self.max_len = max_len\n",
    "\n",
    "    def __len__(self):\n",
    "        return len(self.labels)\n",
    "\n",
    "    def __getitem__(self, idx):\n",
    "        tokens   = self.texts[idx].split()[:self.max_len]\n",
    "        ids      = [self.vocab.get(t, 1) for t in tokens]\n",
    "        real_len = len(ids)\n",
    "        ids     += [0] * (self.max_len - real_len)\n",
    "        mask     = [True]*real_len + [False]*(self.max_len - real_len)\n",
    "        return (\n",
    "            torch.tensor(ids,              dtype=torch.long),\n",
    "            torch.tensor(mask,             dtype=torch.bool),\n",
    "            torch.tensor(self.labels[idx], dtype=torch.long),\n",
    "        )\n",
    "\n",
    "def make_loader(df, shuffle=True):\n",
    "    # PATCH 3: khong dung WeightedRandomSampler\n",
    "    # class_weight trong loss (Cell 10) xu ly imbalance\n",
    "    ds = ReviewDataset(df, vocab)\n",
    "    return DataLoader(ds, batch_size=BATCH_SIZE, shuffle=shuffle,\n",
    "                      num_workers=2, pin_memory=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "train_loader = make_loader(train_df, shuffle=True)\n",
    "val_loader   = make_loader(val_df,   shuffle=False)\n",
    "test_loader  = make_loader(test_df,  shuffle=False)\n",
    "print(f'Train batches: {len(train_loader)} | Val: {len(val_loader)} | Test: {len(test_loader)}')\n",
    "print('WeightedRandomSampler: TAT (PATCH 3)')\n",
    "print('Class weight trong Loss: BAT (PATCH 3) -> xem Cell 10')\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "5d4a6c1f",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-05-24T08:58:40.544373Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-05-24T08:58:40.543725Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-05-24T08:58:41.035899Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-05-24T08:58:41.035190Z"

   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "  OK: FastText weights loaded\n",
      "Tong tham so: 9,708,527\n",
      "Kien truc   : BiLSTM(256x2) + MultiHead(4) + GELU\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# KIEN TRUC: BiLSTM + MULTI-HEAD ATTENTION\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "class MultiHeadAttention(nn.Module):\n",
    "    def __init__(self, hidden_dim, num_heads=4, dropout=0.1):\n",
    "        super().__init__()\n",
    "        self.num_heads = num_heads\n",
    "        d = hidden_dim * 2\n",
    "        self.head_projs  = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(d, d//num_heads) for _ in range(num_heads)])\n",
    "        self.head_scores = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(d//num_heads, 1) for _ in range(num_heads)])\n",
    "        self.output_proj = nn.Linear(d * num_heads, d)\n",
    "        self.dropout     = nn.Dropout(dropout)\n",
    "        self.layer_norm  = nn.LayerNorm(d)\n",
    "\n",
    "    def forward(self, lstm_out, mask):\n",
    "        head_ctxs, head_wts = [], []\n",
    "        for proj, scorer in zip(self.head_projs, self.head_scores):\n",
    "            h      = torch.tanh(proj(lstm_out))\n",
    "            scores = scorer(h).squeeze(-1)\n",
    "            scores = scores.masked_fill(~mask, -1e9)\n",
    "            wts    = self.dropout(F.softmax(scores, dim=1))\n",
    "            ctx    = torch.bmm(wts.unsqueeze(1), lstm_out).squeeze(1)\n",
    "            head_ctxs.append(ctx)\n",
    "            head_wts.append(wts)\n",
    "        multi = torch.cat(head_ctxs, dim=-1)\n",
    "        out   = self.layer_norm(self.output_proj(multi))\n",
    "        avg_w = torch.stack(head_wts).mean(0)\n",
    "        return out, avg_w\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "class BiLSTMSentiment(nn.Module):\n",
    "    def __init__(self, vocab_size, emb_dim=300, hidden_dim=256,\n",
    "                 num_layers=2, num_classes=3, num_heads=4,\n",
    "                 dropout=0.5, pretrained_emb=None):\n",
    "        super().__init__()\n",
    "        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(vocab_size, emb_dim, padding_idx=0)\n",
    "        if pretrained_emb is not None:\n",
    "            self.embedding.weight = nn.Parameter(pretrained_emb)\n",
    "            print('  OK: FastText weights loaded')\n",
    "\n",
    "        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(\n",
    "            emb_dim, hidden_dim,\n",
    "            num_layers=num_layers,\n",
    "            bidirectional=True,\n",
    "            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0,\n",
    "            batch_first=True,\n",
    "        )\n",
    "        self.attention  = MultiHeadAttention(hidden_dim, num_heads, dropout=0.1)\n",
    "        self.dropout    = nn.Dropout(dropout)\n",
    "        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(\n",
    "            nn.Linear(hidden_dim*2, hidden_dim),\n",
    "            nn.GELU(),\n",
    "            nn.Dropout(dropout * 0.6),\n",
    "            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_classes),\n",
    "        )\n",
    "\n",
    "    def forward(self, ids, mask):\n",
    "        emb         = self.dropout(self.embedding(ids))\n",
    "        lstm_out, _ = self.lstm(emb)\n",
    "        lstm_out    = self.dropout(lstm_out)\n",
    "        ctx, attn   = self.attention(lstm_out, mask)\n",
    "        return self.classifier(ctx), attn\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "model = BiLSTMSentiment(\n",
    "    vocab_size    = len(vocab),\n",
    "    emb_dim       = EMB_DIM,\n",
    "    hidden_dim    = HIDDEN_DIM,\n",
    "    num_layers    = NUM_LAYERS,\n",
    "    num_classes   = len(LABEL_MAP),\n",
    "    num_heads     = NUM_HEADS,\n",
    "    dropout       = DROPOUT,\n",
    "    pretrained_emb= pretrained_weights,\n",
    ").to(DEVICE)\n",
    "\n",
    "total = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())\n",
    "print(f'Tong tham so: {total:,}')\n",
    "print(f'Kien truc   : BiLSTM({HIDDEN_DIM}x2) + MultiHead({NUM_HEADS}) + GELU')\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# HUAN LUYEN\n",
    "# PATCH 3: class_weight dung sqrt(n) thay vi 1/n\n",
    "#          -> on hoa, khong overfit qua manh vao Trung tinh\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "CKPT_PATH = f'{WORKING_DIR}/checkpoints/best_model.pt'\n",
    "\n",
    "# Tinh class weight\n",
    "class_counts  = np.bincount([LABEL_MAP[l] for l in train_df['label']])\n",
    "class_weights = torch.FloatTensor(1.0 / np.sqrt(class_counts)).to(DEVICE)  # sqrt, khong linear\n",
    "class_weights = class_weights / class_weights.sum() * len(class_weights)\n",
    "\n",
    "print('Class weights (sqrt -- PATCH 3):')\n",
    "for n, w, c in zip(LABEL_NAMES, class_weights.cpu(), class_counts):\n",
    "    print(f'  {n:<12}: w={w:.3f}  n={c:,}')\n",
    "print(f'  (v2.1 Trung tinh weight=2.045 -- qua cao -> F1 tut)')\n",
    "print(f'  (v2.2 Trung tinh weight uoc tinh ~1.3-1.5 -- on hoa hon)')\n",
    "\n",
    "criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(weight=class_weights, label_smoothing=0.1)\n",
    "optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=LR, weight_decay=5e-4)\n",
    "scheduler = ReduceLROnPlateau(optimizer, mode='min', patience=3, factor=0.5, min_lr=1e-6)\n",
    "\n",
    "class EarlyStopping:\n",
    "    def __init__(self, patience=PATIENCE_ES, path=CKPT_PATH):\n",
    "        self.patience = patience; self.path = path\n",
    "        self.counter  = 0;       self.best_loss = float('inf')\n",
    "\n",
    "    def step(self, val_loss, model):\n",
    "        if val_loss < self.best_loss:\n",
    "            self.best_loss = val_loss; self.counter = 0\n",
    "            torch.save(model.state_dict(), self.path)\n",
    "            print(f'  Saved (val_loss={val_loss:.4f})')\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            self.counter += 1\n",
    "            print(f'  No improvement ({self.counter}/{self.patience})')\n",
    "        return self.counter >= self.patience\n",
    "\n",
    "def run_epoch(model, loader, criterion, optimizer=None, training=True):\n",
    "    model.train() if training else model.eval()\n",
    "    total_loss = correct = total = 0\n",
    "    with torch.set_grad_enabled(training):\n",
    "        for ids, mask, labels in loader:\n",
    "            ids, mask, labels = ids.to(DEVICE), mask.to(DEVICE), labels.to(DEVICE)\n",
    "            logits, _ = model(ids, mask)\n",
    "            loss = criterion(logits, labels)\n",
    "            if training:\n",
    "                optimizer.zero_grad(); loss.backward()\n",
    "                torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), 1.0)\n",
    "                optimizer.step()\n",
    "            total_loss += loss.item() * labels.size(0)\n",
    "            correct    += (logits.argmax(1) == labels).sum().item()\n",
    "            total      += labels.size(0)\n",
    "    return total_loss / total, correct / total\n",
    "\n",
    "def get_macro_f1(model, loader):\n",
    "    model.eval(); preds, gts = [], []\n",
    "    with torch.no_grad():\n",
    "        for ids, mask, labels in loader:\n",
    "            ids, mask = ids.to(DEVICE), mask.to(DEVICE)\n",
    "            preds.extend(model(ids, mask)[0].argmax(1).cpu().numpy())\n",
    "            gts.extend(labels.numpy())\n",
    "    return f1_score(gts, preds, average='macro')\n",
    "\n",
    "es      = EarlyStopping()\n",
    "history = {'tl':[], 'vl':[], 'ta':[], 'va':[], 'vf1':[]}\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f'\\nHuan luyen tren {DEVICE} | {NUM_EPOCHS} epochs max...')\n",
    "print('='*72)\n",
    "for epoch in range(1, NUM_EPOCHS+1):\n",
    "    t0 = time.time()\n",
    "    tl, ta = run_epoch(model, train_loader, criterion, optimizer, True)\n",
    "    vl, va = run_epoch(model, val_loader,   criterion, training=False)\n",
    "    vf1    = get_macro_f1(model, val_loader)\n",
    "    scheduler.step(vl)\n",
    "    lr = optimizer.param_groups[0]['lr']\n",
    "    history['tl'].append(tl); history['vl'].append(vl)\n",
    "    history['ta'].append(ta); history['va'].append(va)\n",
    "    history['vf1'].append(vf1)\n",
    "    print(f'Ep {epoch:02d} ({time.time()-t0:.0f}s) | '\n",
    "          f'Train L={tl:.4f} Acc={ta:.3f} | '\n",
    "          f'Val L={vl:.4f} Acc={va:.3f} F1={vf1:.3f} | lr={lr:.6f}')\n",
    "    if es.step(vl, model): print('Early Stopping!'); break\n",
    "\n",
    "best_ep = history['vl'].index(min(history['vl'])) + 1\n",
    "print(f'\\nBest epoch: {best_ep} | Best Val F1: {max(history[\"vf1\"]):.3f}')\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# DANH GIA TREN TAP TEST\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "model.load_state_dict(torch.load(CKPT_PATH))\n",
    "model.eval()\n",
    "all_preds, all_true = [], []\n",
    "with torch.no_grad():\n",
    "    for ids, mask, labels in test_loader:\n",
    "        ids, mask = ids.to(DEVICE), mask.to(DEVICE)\n",
    "        all_preds.extend(model(ids, mask)[0].argmax(1).cpu().numpy())\n",
    "        all_true.extend(labels.numpy())\n",
    "\n",
    "print('\\n' + '='*62)\n",
    "print('  BAO CAO PHAN LOAI (TEST SET)')\n",
    "print('='*62)\n",
    "print(classification_report(all_true, all_preds, target_names=LABEL_NAMES))\n",
    "\n",
    "macro_f1 = f1_score(all_true, all_preds, average='macro')\n",
    "weighted = f1_score(all_true, all_preds, average='weighted')\n",
    "per_cls  = f1_score(all_true, all_preds, average=None)\n",
    "acc      = accuracy_score(all_true, all_preds)\n",
    "\n",
    "ep  = range(1, len(history['tl'])+1)\n",
    "bep = history['vl'].index(min(history['vl'])) + 1\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 4))\n",
    "for ax, (tk, vk), name in zip(axes,\n",
    "        [('tl','vl'),('ta','va'),('vf1',None)],\n",
    "        ['Loss','Accuracy','Val Macro F1']):\n",
    "    ax.plot(ep, history[tk], 'b-o', ms=3, label='Train')\n",
    "    if vk:\n",
    "        ax.plot(ep, history[vk], 'r-o', ms=3, label='Val')\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        ax.axhline(macro_f1, color='red', ls=':', lw=1.5, label=f'Test={macro_f1:.3f}')\n",
    "    ax.axvline(bep, color='green', ls='--', alpha=0.6)\n",
    "    ax.set_title(name); ax.legend(fontsize=8); ax.grid(alpha=0.3)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/training_curves.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "plt.show()\n",

    "ax1.set_title('Confusion Matrix (tuyet doi)')\n",

   "source": [
    "# ABLATION STUDY -- DO LUONG DONG GOP TUNG PATCH\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "\n",
    "def train_quick(emb_dim, num_heads, pretrained_emb, use_cw_sqrt, run_name, n_epochs=10):\n",
    "    print(f'\\n-- {run_name} --')\n",
    "    m = BiLSTMSentiment(\n",
    "        vocab_size=len(vocab), emb_dim=emb_dim, hidden_dim=128,\n",
    "        num_layers=1, num_classes=3, num_heads=num_heads,\n",
    "        dropout=0.5, pretrained_emb=pretrained_emb,\n",
    "    ).to(DEVICE)\n",
    "    opt  = torch.optim.AdamW(m.parameters(), lr=3e-4, weight_decay=5e-4)\n",
    "    if use_cw_sqrt:\n",
    "        crit = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(weight=class_weights, label_smoothing=0.1)\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        crit = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)\n",
    "    best_f1, best_state = 0.0, None\n",
    "    for _ in range(n_epochs):\n",
    "        run_epoch(m, train_loader, crit, opt, training=True)\n",
    "        vf1 = get_macro_f1(m, val_loader)\n",
    "        if vf1 > best_f1:\n",
    "            best_f1 = vf1\n",
    "            best_state = {k: v.clone() for k, v in m.state_dict().items()}\n",
    "    m.load_state_dict(best_state)\n",
    "    m.eval()\n",
    "    preds, gts = [], []\n",
    "    with torch.no_grad():\n",
    "        for ids, mask, labels in test_loader:\n",
    "            ids, mask = ids.to(DEVICE), mask.to(DEVICE)\n",
    "            preds.extend(m(ids, mask)[0].argmax(1).cpu().numpy())\n",
    "            gts.extend(labels.numpy())\n",
    "    tf1  = f1_score(gts, preds, average='macro')\n",
    "    pcls = f1_score(gts, preds, average=None)\n",
    "    print(f'  Macro F1={tf1:.3f} | Pos={pcls[0]:.3f} Neg={pcls[1]:.3f} Neu={pcls[2]:.3f}')\n",
    "    return {'name': run_name, 'macro_f1': tf1, 'per_class': pcls}\n",
    "\n",
    "ablation_results = []\n",
    "ablation_results.append(train_quick(128, 1, None, False,\n",
    "    'A: Baseline (scratch, 1-head, no cw)'))\n",
    "ablation_results.append(train_quick(128, 4, None, False,\n",
    "    'B: + Multi-head 4'))\n",
    "ablation_results.append(train_quick(128, 4, None, True,\n",
    "    'C: + Class weight sqrt (PATCH 3)'))\n",
    "if pretrained_weights is not None:\n",
    "    ablation_results.append(train_quick(EMB_DIM, 4, pretrained_weights, True,\n",
    "        'D: + FastText compound avg (PATCH 2+3)'))\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    print('FastText khong co -- bo qua config D')\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11, max(4, len(ablation_results)*1.4)))\n",
    "names  = [r['name'] for r in ablation_results]\n",
    "macros = [r['macro_f1'] for r in ablation_results]\n",
    "clrs   = ['#888','#4A90D9','#E8A838','#3B9E5A'][:len(ablation_results)]\n",
    "bars   = ax.barh(names, macros, color=clrs, alpha=0.85, edgecolor='white')\n",
    "for bar, v in zip(bars, macros):\n",
    "    ax.text(v+0.003, bar.get_y()+bar.get_height()/2,\n",
    "            f'{v:.3f}', va='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel('Macro F1 (Test Set)')\n",
    "ax.set_title('Ablation Study v2.2 -- 3 patches')\n",
    "ax.set_xlim(0, min(1.0, max(macros)+0.10))\n",
    "ax.grid(axis='x', alpha=0.3)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/ablation.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },

    "# DEMO DU DOAN\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "model.load_state_dict(torch.load(CKPT_PATH))\n",
    "model.eval()\n",
    "LABEL_DISPLAY = {0: 'TICH CUC', 1: 'TIEU CUC', 2: 'TRUNG TINH'}\n",
    "\n",
    "def predict(text, show_top=5):\n",
    "    clean    = clean_text_v2(text)\n",
    "    tokens   = clean.split()[:MAX_LEN]\n",
    "    ids      = [vocab.get(t, 1) for t in tokens]\n",
    "    real_len = len(ids)\n",
    "    ids     += [0] * (MAX_LEN - real_len)\n",
    "    mask     = [True]*real_len + [False]*(MAX_LEN-real_len)\n",
    "    ids_t    = torch.tensor([ids],  dtype=torch.long).to(DEVICE)\n",
    "    mask_t   = torch.tensor([mask], dtype=torch.bool).to(DEVICE)\n",
    "    with torch.no_grad():\n",
    "        logits, attn = model(ids_t, mask_t)\n",
    "        probs = F.softmax(logits, dim=1)[0].cpu().numpy()\n",
    "        pred  = int(probs.argmax())\n",
    "    print(f'\\n' + '-'*60)\n",
    "    print(f'  Input   : {text[:85]}')\n",
    "    print(f'  Cleaned : {clean[:70]}')\n",
    "    print(f'  Ket qua : {LABEL_DISPLAY[pred]}')\n",
    "    print(f'  Xac suat: TC={probs[0]:.1%}  TiC={probs[1]:.1%}  TT={probs[2]:.1%}')\n",
    "    if real_len > 0:\n",
    "        w   = attn[0, :real_len].cpu().numpy()\n",
    "        idx = w.argsort()[-min(show_top, real_len):][::-1]\n",
    "        hot = [(tokens[i], round(float(w[i]),3)) for i in idx]\n",
    "        print(f'  Attention: {hot}')\n",
    "    print('-'*60)\n",
    "    return LABEL_DISPLAY[pred], probs\n",
    "\n",
    "samples = [\n",
    "    # Ro rang\n",
    "    'San pham qua tuyet voi \\U0001f60d ship nhanh, dong goi can than!!!',\n",
    "    'Hang gia, khong giong anh \\U0001f621 rat that vong, k bao gio mua lai',\n",
    "    # Phu dinh\n",
    "    'khong dep lam, chat luong khong tot, khong dang tien',\n",
    "    'khong te nhung cung khong xuat sac gi',\n",
    "    # OOV khong dau -- test PATCH 1\n",
    "    'Rac qua, te lam, k mua lai dau',\n",
    "    'Tot lam, dep lam, giao nhanh',\n",
    "    # Emoji -- test PATCH 1 (khong con stkn0z)\n",
    "    'sp ok lam \\U0001f4af ship nhanh le, dong goi ky, mik thik lam',\n",
    "    'hang ko giong anh \\U0001f621 k mua lai dau, rat that vong',\n",
    "    # Mia mai\n",
    "    'Shop giao hang nhanh nhu rua bo \\U0001f422 dinh that su',\n",
    "    # Trung tinh\n",
    "    'Hang den dung hen, binh thuong khong co gi dac biet',\n",
    "    # Ngan\n",
    "    'Tot', 'Rac', 'ok', 'Tot lam', 'Rac qua',\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "print('='*60)\n",
    "print('  DEMO -- v2.2 (3 patches)')\n",
    "print('='*60)\n",
    "for s in samples:\n",
    "    predict(s)\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# TOM TAT v2.2\n",
    "# ============================================================\n",
    "cm_norm = confusion_matrix(all_true, all_preds, normalize='pred').diagonal()\n",
    "cm_rec  = confusion_matrix(all_true, all_preds, normalize='true').diagonal()\n",
    "neu_i   = LABEL_NAMES.index('Trung tinh')\n",
    "embed_s = 'FastText 300d + compound avg' if pretrained_weights is not None else 'Scratch 128d'\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"\"\"\n",
    "TONG KET -- BiLSTM SENTIMENT v2.2\n",
    "============================================================\n",
    "3 PATCH SO VOI v2.1\n",
    "  PATCH 1  Placeholder lowercase -> emoji token chinh xac\n",
    "           (v2.1: 'stkn0x' lo ra trong cleaned text)\n",
    "  PATCH 2  FastText compound averaging\n",
    "           (v2.1: 36.8% coverage -> v2.2: ~70%+)\n",
    "  PATCH 3  Chi dung class_weight SQRT, tat WeightedSampler\n",
    "           (v2.1: ca 2 cung luc -> xung dot -> Ablation C: F1=0.605)\n",
    "\n",
    "DU LIEU       : {len(df_all):,} mau | Vocab: {len(vocab):,} tu\n",
    "EMBEDDING     : {embed_s}\n",
    "KIEN TRUC     : BiLSTM({HIDDEN_DIM}x2) + MultiHead-Attn({NUM_HEADS}) + GELU\n",
    "\n",
    "KET QUA TEST\n",
    "  Macro F1       : {macro_f1:.3f}   (v2.1: 0.825  |  v2.0: 0.826)\n",
    "  Weighted F1    : {weighted:.3f}\n",
    "  Accuracy       : {acc:.3f}\n",
    "  ----------------------------------\n",
    "  F1 Tich cuc    : {per_cls[0]:.3f}   (v2.1: 0.901)\n",
    "  F1 Tieu cuc    : {per_cls[1]:.3f}   (v2.1: 0.907)\n",
    "  F1 Trung tinh  : {per_cls[2]:.3f}   (v2.1: 0.667  target: >=0.72)\n",
    "    Precision Neu: {cm_norm[neu_i]:.3f}   (v2.1: 0.556  target: >=0.68)\n",
    "    Recall Neu   : {cm_rec[neu_i]:.3f}   (v2.1: 0.834)\n",
    "============================================================\n",
    "\"\"\")\n"
   ]

   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix\n",
    "import torch\n",
    "\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "# CẤU HÌNH TOÀN CỤC CHUẨN IEEE (Times New Roman, Size 11)\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "plt.rcParams[\"font.family\"] = \"serif\"\n",
    "plt.rcParams[\"font.serif\"] = [\"Times New Roman\"]\n",
    "plt.rcParams[\"font.size\"] = 11\n",
    "plt.rcParams[\"axes.labelsize\"] = 12\n",
    "plt.rcParams[\"axes.titlesize\"] = 14\n",
    "plt.rcParams[\"xtick.labelsize\"] = 11\n",
    "plt.rcParams[\"ytick.labelsize\"] = 11\n",
    "\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "# 1. BIỂU ĐỒ ĐƯỜNG: TRAINING DYNAMICS (Từ biến 'history' của Cell 10)\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "print(\"Đang tạo Figure 1: Training Dynamics...\")\n",
    "ep = np.arange(1, len(history['tl']) + 1)\n",
    "train_loss = history['tl']\n",
    "val_loss = history['vl']\n",
    "val_f1 = history['vf1']\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Trục Y bên trái: Loss\n",
    "color = 'tab:red'\n",
    "ax1.set_xlabel('Epochs')\n",
    "ax1.set_ylabel('Loss', color=color)\n",
    "ax1.plot(ep, train_loss, color=color, linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label='Training Loss')\n",
    "ax1.plot(ep, val_loss, color=color, linestyle='-', marker='o', markersize=5, linewidth=2, label='Validation Loss')\n",
    "ax1.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor=color)\n",
    "ax1.grid(True, linestyle=':', alpha=0.6)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Trục Y bên phải: Macro F1\n",
    "ax2 = ax1.twinx()\n",
    "color = 'tab:blue'\n",
    "ax2.set_ylabel('Macro F1-Score', color=color)\n",
    "ax2.plot(ep, val_f1, color=color, linestyle='-', marker='s', markersize=5, linewidth=2, label='Validation Macro F1')\n",
    "ax2.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor=color)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Gộp legend của 2 trục\n",
    "lines_1, labels_1 = ax1.get_legend_handles_labels()\n",
    "lines_2, labels_2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()\n",
    "ax1.legend(lines_1 + lines_2, labels_1 + labels_2, loc='center right', frameon=True, edgecolor='black')\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.title('Training Dynamics: Loss and Macro F1-Score')\n",
    "fig.tight_layout()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Lưu file chuẩn IEEE\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/Figure1_Training_Dynamics.pdf', format='pdf', dpi=600, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/Figure1_Training_Dynamics.png', format='png', dpi=600, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "# 2. MA TRẬN NHẦM LẪN (Từ mảng 'all_true', 'all_preds' của Cell 11)\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "print(\"Đang tạo Figure 2: Confusion Matrix...\")\n",
    "# Ánh xạ nhãn sang tiếng Anh: index 0, 1, 2 tương ứng Positive, Negative, Neutral\n",
    "ENGLISH_LABELS = ['Positive', 'Negative', 'Neutral']\n",
    "\n",
    "cm = confusion_matrix(all_true, all_preds)\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(6, 5))\n",
    "ax = sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='Blues', \n",
    "                 xticklabels=ENGLISH_LABELS, yticklabels=ENGLISH_LABELS, \n",
    "                 annot_kws={\"size\": 12, \"weight\": \"bold\"},\n",
    "                 cbar_kws={'label': 'Number of Samples'})\n",
    "\n",
    "for _, spine in ax.spines.items():\n",
    "    spine.set_visible(True)\n",
    "    spine.set_color('black')\n",
    "    spine.set_linewidth(1)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.ylabel('True Label')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Predicted Label')\n",
    "plt.title(f'Confusion Matrix on Held-out Test Set (n={len(all_true)})')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/Figure2_Confusion_Matrix.pdf', format='pdf', dpi=600, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/Figure2_Confusion_Matrix.png', format='png', dpi=600, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "# 3. HÀM TẠO ATTENTION HEATMAP TỪ CÂU RAW (Chạy trực tiếp qua model hiện tại)\n",
    "# ==============================================================================\n",
    "def plot_attention_for_text(raw_text, filename):\n",
    "    print(f\"Đang tạo {filename}...\")\n",
    "    model.eval()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Tiền xử lý bằng pipeline v2.2 của bạn\n",
    "    cleaned = clean_text_v2(raw_text)\n",
    "    tokens = cleaned.split()[:MAX_LEN]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    if len(tokens) == 0:\n",
    "        print(\"Câu bị rỗng sau khi tiền xử lý!\")\n",
    "        return\n",
    "        \n",
    "    # Chuyển thành tensor (ánh xạ qua vocab của bạn)\n",
    "    ids = [vocab.get(t, 1) for t in tokens]\n",
    "    real_len = len(ids)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Padding cho đủ MAX_LEN\n",
    "    ids_padded = ids + [0] * (MAX_LEN - real_len)\n",
    "    mask_padded = [True]*real_len + [False]*(MAX_LEN - real_len)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    input_ids = torch.tensor([ids_padded], dtype=torch.long).to(DEVICE)\n",
    "    input_mask = torch.tensor([mask_padded], dtype=torch.bool).to(DEVICE)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Đưa qua model để lấy ma trận Attention\n",
    "    with torch.no_grad():\n",
    "        logits, attn = model(input_ids, input_mask)\n",
    "        \n",
    "    # attn trả về có shape [batch, len] -> cắt bỏ phần padding\n",
    "    attn_weights = attn[0][:real_len].cpu().numpy()\n",
    "    pred_idx = logits.argmax(1).item()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Vẽ Heatmap\n",
    "    att_matrix = np.array(attn_weights).reshape(1, -1)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(len(tokens)*0.8 + 1, 2.5))\n",
    "    ax = sns.heatmap(att_matrix, annot=True, fmt=\".3f\", cmap='Reds',\n",
    "                     xticklabels=tokens, yticklabels=['Attention\\nWeight'],\n",
    "                     cbar_kws={\"orientation\": \"horizontal\", \"pad\": 0.3},\n",
    "                     annot_kws={\"size\": 11})\n",
    "\n",
    "    plt.xticks(rotation=30, ha='right')\n",
    "    plt.yticks(rotation=0)\n",
    "    plt.title('Multi-Head Attention Weights Distribution')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for _, spine in ax.spines.items():\n",
    "        spine.set_visible(True)\n",
    "        spine.set_color('black')\n",
    "        spine.set_linewidth(1)\n",
    "\n",
    "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "    plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/{filename}.pdf', format='pdf', dpi=600, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "    plt.savefig(f'{WORKING_DIR}/logs/{filename}.png', format='png', dpi=600, bbox_inches='tight')\n",
    "    plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- Chạy lấy 2 ảnh demo đưa vào bài báo ---\n",
    "sample_text_1 = \"Shop giao hang nhanh nhu rua bo 🐢 dinh that su\"\n",
    "plot_attention_for_text(sample_text_1, \"Figure3_Attention_Sarcasm\")\n",
    "\n",
    "sample_text_2 = \"San pham qua tuyet voi 😍 ship nhanh, dong goi can than!!!\"\n",
    "plot_attention_for_text(sample_text_2, \"Figure4_Attention_Positive\")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nĐÃ LƯU TẤT CẢ ẢNH VÀO: /kaggle/working/logs/\")"
   ]
  }
 ],
